channel.title: ABF on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA
channel.description: Recent content in ABF on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA

item.title: What Are CoWoS, HBM, and ABF - And Why Do They Matter So Much in the AI Era?
item.description: A plain-language walkthrough of CoWoS, HBM, and ABF — what they actually are, why they are always mentioned together, and how they map onto Taiwan's role in the global AI supply chain.
